name: compliance source contract validator emits a structured json record for downstream tooling consumption
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources: []\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-source-contract.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml --emit json --out result.json 2>err.txt && grep -q '"valid"' result.json && grep -q '"sources_count":0' result.json && echo ok 1>&2
